S.FORM: Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia I 1949 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Andorra anini i ci Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *o~uan-…ônri ¶ b~vib~v…ôs i si ¶*…æia i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~uan-…ônri ¶ b~vib~v…ôs i si ¶*…æia, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u an…¨~…Æo~urra anini i ¶i *o~uan-…ônri ¶ b~vib~v…ôs i si ¶*…æia, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia I 1949 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 24 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Andorra anini i ci Joan-Enric Vives i Sic√≠lia, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
